title: How to Do Quests
description: A short tutorial that explains how quests work in DSPACE.

dialogue.text: Welcome to DSPACE! I'm dChat, your virtual guide. I'll teach you the basics of how quests work in this world.
Each quest is a short conversation with goals to achieve. Choose responses to advance and meet the objectives.
When you see an option that completes the quest, click it to finish and claim your reward.
That's all you need to know. Have fun exploring the cosmos and helping our community!
